framework.name: Agent-to-agent auth is explicitly scoped
framework.description: Section 10.3.3 'Agents Accessed by Systems or Other Agents' and the interaction model (step 4: 'A Tool endpoint may itself be implemented by another AI agent') show agent-to-agent scenarios are in scope. Uses OAuth delegation + transaction tokens for multi-hop chains rather than novel mutual auth.
framework.raw_quote: A Tool endpoint may itself be implemented by another AI agent.

source.title: draft-klrc-aiagent-auth-00 - AI Agent Authentication and Authorization
